message:
fix(doctor): suppress expected .beads/ deletions in redirect worktrees (#2080)

Filter expected .beads/ file deletions in redirect worktrees before evaluating
git working tree cleanliness. Prevents misleading "commit or stash" warnings
that would harm the repo if followed.

Also fixes TrimSpace bug that corrupted porcelain status parsing when lines
started with a space.

Co-Authored-By: Xexr <Xexr@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
